subject: Sociology
title: Defining Social Class
description: A short lesson to help you apply Defining Social Class.

hook.text: Ask Americans their class and most say middle. Ask sociologists and they'll point to your income, education, and job.

buildup.text: Social class combines economic position, educational attainment, and occupational prestige into one ranking.

discovery.text: Marx saw two classes: owners and workers. Weber added a third dimension — status and political power.

twist.text: Most people misidentify their own class. The rich understate; the poor overstate. Self-perception is unreliable.

climax.text: Class shapes nearly everything: health, relationships, tastes, politics, and even how long you live.

punchline.text: Class isn't just money. It's the life money builds.
